assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 6 task files in the outputs directory: task-1-advisory-severity-summary-model.md, task-2-advisory-summary-service.md, task-3-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-cache-invalidation.md, task-5-integration-tests.md, task-6-threshold-query-param.md. 6 is within the range [3, 10].
Every task file has '## Repository' followed by 'trustify-backend': Task 1 line 3-4, Task 2 line 3-4, Task 3 line 3-4, Task 4 line 3-4, Task 5 line 3-4, Task 6 line 3-4.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency graph: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 1 and Task 2. Task 4 depends on Task 3. Task 5 depends on Task 3. Task 6 depends on Task 3 and Task 5. This forms a valid DAG: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> {4, 5} and 5 -> 6, with no back edges or cycles. Topological ordering: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: All Files to Modify paths exist in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 48), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (line 83), tests/Cargo.toml (line 114). All Files to Create are new files in directories that exist in the manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ (exists, contains summary.rs and details.rs), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ (exists, contains list.rs and get.rs), tests/api/ (exists, contains sbom.rs and advisory.rs). Task 6 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs which is created in Task 3.

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md contains 7 specific changes with concrete details: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct with fields critical, high, medium, low, total in the SBOM model module'; 'Add advisory_summary service method to SbomService that queries the sbom_advisory join table, deduplicates by advisory ID, groups by severity'; 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint handler with 5-minute cache TTL using tower-http caching middleware'; specific struct names, method names, endpoint paths, join table references, and cache TTL values are all concrete.

assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks have a '## Repository' section containing exactly one repository name 'trustify-backend' with no additional repositories listed. Verified in: task-1 line 3-4, task-2 line 3-4, task-3 line 3-4, task-4 line 3-4, task-5 line 3-4, task-6 line 3-4.

assertion_results.evidence: All modified file paths appear verbatim in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 48), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (line 83), tests/Cargo.toml (line 114), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/list.rs (line 49 - referenced in Task 6 modify of advisory_summary.rs created in Task 3). assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs (SbomSummary), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs (SbomDetails), common/src/model/paginated.rs (PaginatedResults<T>), modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs (severity field), and specifies derive macros 'Serialize, Deserialize, Clone, Debug'. Task 2 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (SbomService: fetch, list, ingest), entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, common/src/error.rs (AppError), common/src/db/query.rs, and specifies '.context() wrapping'. Task 3 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs (GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, server/src/main.rs, and specifies 'Result<Json<AdvisorySeveritySummary>, AppError>'. Task 4 references: modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs, entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs, modules/ingestor/src/service/mod.rs (IngestorService), modules/ingestor/src/graph/sbom/mod.rs. Task 5 references: tests/api/sbom.rs, tests/api/advisory.rs, entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs, tests/Cargo.toml, and specifies 'assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK) pattern'. Task 6 references: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/list.rs, common/src/db/query.rs, and specifies 'Axum Query<T> extraction' and 'AdvisorySummaryParams' struct.
